title: Phalanx (CR90 corvette)
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
{{Youmay|the ''Phalanx'', a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]]|the [[Phalanx (cruiser)|''Phalanx'']], a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] cruiser}}
[[File:Phalanx_crv.jpg|thumb|right|250px|[[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] during the [[Battle of Mylok IV|Conflict at Mylok IV]].]]
[[Habeen]] researchers used [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] '''''Phalanx''''' at the [[Battle of Mylok IV|Mylok IV Conflict]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Corvette ''Phalanx'' docked with Habeen containers at the Habeen deep-space research facility, rescuing critical [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] technology from an attack by [[Nharwaak]] dissidents. The ship took heavy damage protecting the facility.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]

*<!-- 1994-07-18 -->''[[TIE Fighter: The Official Strategy Guide]]''
